title: otopappus curviflorus
intro: Otopappus curviflorus, also known as the curved flower otopappus, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Otopappus curviflorus include reducing inflammation, promoting healing, and protecting against microbial infections. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
